title: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: SYMMETRY CARE INC COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include case management, individual and family support plans, access to brokerage services, in-home supports or residential placement, employment and vocational services, and abuse investigation and protective services. 348 W Adams Street Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Individuals with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicant must be an Oregon resident and a US citizen. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 573-8151 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 573-8151 Angie Temple [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to request an application. An appointment will be scheduled with an eligibility worker who can help you through the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of citizenship, proof of address, and records of any/all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Harney County Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - HARNEY COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SYMMETRY CARE INC
